summary:
Clinical supervision supports workforce resilience by enhancing professional development, ensuring accountability, and improving patient safety through structured evaluation methods such as OPPE and FPPE. It directly contributes to sustaining high-quality care under demanding contemporary healthcare conditions. 

Note: The summary must not include any external information or references beyond what was provided in Agent1’s response.
